Do you watch video sites?
(Jumps to the flashback room.)

質問メッセージ = Do you go to school?
選択肢リスト = ["{\"label\":\"go to school\",\"switchId\":\"\",\"resultNumber\":\"0\"}","{\"label\":\"I'm not going yet\",\"switchId\":\"\",\"resultNumber\":\"0\"}"]
(I felt the worst after just one day...
How long has it been since going to school has been painful? )
(Even if you take a break, the situation will only get worse.
We have to do our best to overcome the current situation! ! Let's go to school. )
(Today I can finally talk to Yumesaki-san!!
First of all, if you apologize and get a reply... )
I want to talk to Yumesaki-san quickly, let's wait outside! ! )
(Okay, I slept well. I'm sure everything up until now was a dream.
I don't care about my promise with Hosoyama. Let's talk like usual. )
(Kagami-san's situation is complicated, but things will work out somehow...I think.
First of all, I want to go to school with Yumesaki-san in the morning. )
